title: Remove Nth Node From End of List
input_format: The `head` of a linked list and an integer `n`.
output_format: The head of the modified linked list.
constraints:
- The number of nodes in the list is `sz`.
- `1 <= sz <= 30`
- `0 <= Node.val <= 100`
- `1 <= n <= sz`
function_signature: function removeNthFromEnd(head: ListNode | null, n: number): ListNode | null {}
